name: Syna 5 Light 60" Floor Lamp - FLL3009 - Multi - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your living space with the SYNA Floor Lamp, an elegant fusion of multi-colored glass shades, a marble base, and a sleek metal body. Designed to enrich your home with a soft, ambient glow, the lamp features a series of glass orbs in complementary hues, delicately perched on a towering metal frame that adds a touch of sophistication to any room.

The sturdy marble base provides a stable foundation, while the alternating frosted and textured glass shades bring a diverse and warm light to your cozy corners. Whether youre looking to add a tranquil atmosphere to your reading nook or a subtle touch of style to your lounge, the SYNA Floor Lamps design caters to both functional lighting needs and aesthetic appeal.

Elevate your home d?cor with the captivating shine and artistic arrangement that the SYNA Floor Lamp offers, making it a central piece for any interior design enthusiast.
